name: breaking
voice: live-news takeover — the whole clip is a cable-news package. Body words ride a navy chyron and reveal by broadcast wipe (clip-path L→R + a 2px slam-kick); emphasis words flash a yellow highlight and pop; a never-stopping ticker scrolls one long head string at constant speed and DOUBLES its pace at the takeover. Furniture: red bar tab, pulsing LIVE bug, ticking timestamp. The apex is a BREAKING banner that slams down onto the chyron (scaleY 0→1, elastic dig-in) while the hero word STAMPS in Anton — crush, contact squash, elastic settle — under a 3-flash red/white strobe; a red BREAKING clock flips over the timestamp; the studio dims and a red alert wash pulses while a ghosted hero watermark drifts behind the subject. Exit: the banner collapses to a 2px line the ticker absorbs.
when: news-adjacent explainers, hot takes, announcements, reactions, anything that should read URGENT / BREAKING. Loud register; needs a lower third that tolerates a navy chyron + red banner.

ticker.label: LATEST
ticker.head: ROOFTOP OBSERVATORY REPORTS CLEAREST SKIES OF THE SEASON +++ CITY TELESCOPE ARRAY ENTERS FINAL CALIBRATION PHASE +++ SENSOR TEAM CLAIMS RECORD SIGNAL RECOVERY FROM NOISE FLOOR +++ AMATEUR ASTRONOMERS FLOOD DOWNTOWN ROOFTOPS AT DUSK +++ NEW DENOISING PIPELINE TURNS HEADS AT IMAGING SUMMIT +++ STARGAZERS UNDETERRED BY LIGHT POLLUTION +++ ENGINEERS SAY PIXEL LIMITS NO LONGER THE CEILING +++ MORE AT THE TOP OF THE HOUR +++
